name: {{name}}
description: Artifact Portal convergence workspace — Canvas + Dashboard + Herdr → disk

scripts.hooks:doctor: bash -n scripts/hooks-install.sh && echo '✓ hooks-install shell OK'

postinstall: echo '✅ Artifact Portal convergence workspace ready.'
echo '   Offline publish: bun run portal:local'
echo '   Convergence test: bun run verify'
echo '   Install pre-push guard: bun run hooks:install'
